tags.value:
SELECT p.id, p.name, p.description, p.picture, 
		       p.price_currency_code, p.price_units, p.price_nanos, p.categories
		FROM catalog.products p
		WHERE p.id = $1

		FROM catalog.products p
		WHERE p.id = $1
